race.comment: SONIC SURGE (6) was strong guy fancied fresh on heavy ground at Sandown but didn't go a yard. Straight to the synthetic and fitter again and blinkers off. Expected to improve out of sight. APACHE SUNRISE (7) is building to a win, placing a Stawell then placing again here last time. Close to a win and gets chance. BOHEMIAN STAR (1) is a first starter by Castelvecchio out of Flowerchild. Well educated with five hit-outs leading into this, the latest when placing in a Ballarat Synthetic jump-out. Senior rider aboard and expected to measure up. BRILLIANT BULL ANT (2) was close to the winner latest and looks set for another big run.
